## Checklist

- [ ] Title is a short, meaningful summary
- [ ] `npm --workspace app run build` passes (TS type-check + production build)
- [ ] Dashboard loads end-to-end locally (`npm run dev`) and widgets render without console errors
- [ ] Any new FHIR fields handle missing/malformed data gracefully
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, copilot-instructions, or skill configs) if behavior changed
